messages.content: # Just bought VIP and have no clue on what to do? Follow this guide!
# Below you will find a detailed guide on how to setup your No Hesi account to gain access to our VIP servers/cars for both Website subscribers & Discord subscribers.

## Step 1
> Go to [nohesi.gg](https://nohesi.gg/), open the Account drop-down then click “Edit Profile”

## Step 2
> Ensure you’re on the “Edit Profile” tab, click on social links then click “Link” next to steam
> If you used Discord to subscribe or want the role on our Discord server, also link your Discord

## Step 3
> Click “Sign In” ensuring it is on the correct account that you will be using to play.

## Step 4
> It will send you to your profile and show the new Steam account connected to your No Hesi account.
### If you do not gain access to your benefits, please tag a staff member in the <#964650227342655499> ﻿channel with proof of your purchase and a ticket will be made for further assistance.
